section: AP 11: Soft Tissue, Bones, and Joints
allocation_strategy: Clinical judgment emphasizing high-yield sarcoma and bone tumor differentials

questions.topic: Liposarcoma vs. lipoma differential: morphologic variants
questions.education_objective: Distinguish liposarcoma subtypes from benign lipomatous lesions using morphologic criteria

questions.topic: Leiomyosarcoma vs. leiomyoma: mitotic criteria & immunostains
questions.education_objective: Differentiate leiomyosarcoma from leiomyoma using mitotic count and smooth muscle markers

questions.topic: Synovial sarcoma: biphasic vs. monophasic patterns & translocations
questions.education_objective: Recognize synovial sarcoma patterns and confirm with molecular studies

questions.topic: Ewing sarcoma: morphology & immunophenotype differential
questions.education_objective: Diagnose Ewing sarcoma and distinguish from other small round cell tumors

questions.topic: Pleomorphic undifferentiated sarcoma: diagnosis of exclusion
questions.education_objective: Apply criteria for pleomorphic undifferentiated sarcoma as diagnosis of exclusion

questions.topic: Rhabdomyosarcoma: embryonal vs. alveolar subtypes
questions.education_objective: Classify rhabdomyosarcoma subtypes and correlate with prognosis

questions.topic: Solitary fibrous tumor vs. other spindle cell lesions
questions.education_objective: Recognize solitary fibrous tumor and confirm with CD34/STAT6 staining

questions.topic: Reactive lesions simulating sarcomas
questions.education_objective: Distinguish reactive pseudosarcomatous lesions from true sarcomas

questions.topic: Osteosarcoma: conventional vs. variants & staging
questions.education_objective: Recognize osteosarcoma variants and apply staging criteria

questions.topic: Chondrosarcoma: grading & differential from enchondroma
questions.education_objective: Grade chondrosarcoma and distinguish from benign enchondroma

questions.topic: Giant cell tumor vs. other giant cell lesions
questions.education_objective: Differentiate giant cell tumor from other giant cell-containing lesions

questions.topic: Metastatic tumors to bone: patterns & common primaries
questions.education_objective: Recognize metastatic patterns and identify likely primary sites

questions.topic: Paget disease: phases & malignant transformation
questions.education_objective: Identify Paget disease phases and recognize sarcomatous transformation

questions.topic: Fibrous dysplasia vs. other fibro-osseous lesions
questions.education_objective: Distinguish fibrous dysplasia from other fibro-osseous lesions

questions.topic: Osteochondroma: morphology & malignant transformation
questions.education_objective: Recognize osteochondroma and assess for malignant transformation

questions.topic: Tenosynovial giant cell tumor: localized vs. diffuse
questions.education_objective: Classify tenosynovial giant cell tumor variants and prognosis

questions.topic: Crystal arthropathies: gout vs. CPPD morphology
questions.education_objective: Distinguish uric acid from calcium pyrophosphate crystal deposits

questions.topic: Myeloma vs. metastatic carcinoma in bone
questions.education_objective: Distinguish myeloma from metastatic carcinoma using morphology and immunostains

questions.topic: Epithelioid sarcoma: conventional vs. proximal type
questions.education_objective: Recognize epithelioid sarcoma variants and immunophenotype

questions.topic: Clear cell sarcoma vs. malignant melanoma
questions.education_objective: Distinguish clear cell sarcoma from melanoma using molecular markers
